title: Legal weed: Florida to vote on legalizing recreational pot in November
shortDescription: The Florida Supreme Court on Monday approved a recreational marijuana constitutional amendment for the November 2024 statewide ballot.

title: Donald Trump doubles down on 'bloodbath' warning as he criticizes Joe Biden
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump returned to the campaign trail Tuesday and again employed the violent imagery of a "bloodbath."

title: No, Biden did not end Social Security with order | Fact check
shortDescription: By scrolling past a video without listening, a social media user could believe that President Biden ended Social Security, SSI and "side hustles."

title: In Hunter Biden tax case, judge refuses to dismiss charges
shortDescription: Hunter Biden asked a federal judge to dismiss tax charges as politically motivated but was rejected.

title: Abortion, marijuana ballot measures may draw women, younger voters
shortDescription: Ballot measures on abortion access and recreational marijuana may jolt election season in Florida, bringing more women and younger voters to the polls.

title: RFK Jr. argues Biden is greater threat to democracy than Trump
shortDescription: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. argued that President Joe Biden is a greater threat to democracy than ex-President Donald Trump in an interview Monday.

title: Florida voters will decide fate of abortion rights
shortDescription: Florida's Supreme Court made a ruling that allows a six-week abortion ban to go into effect, but voters get to weigh in on the issue on the ballot.

title: Biden expresses outrage over deaths of World Central Kitchen workers
shortDescription: President Joe Biden called chef José Andrés after seven World Central Kitchen workers killed in airstrike by Israeli military.

title: Trump White House insider Hope Hicks to testify in NY hush money trial
shortDescription: Former Trump White House Communications Director Hope Hicks is expected to testify in Trump's New York criminal hush money trial, per media reports.

title: See where abortion-related ballot measures have been successful before
shortDescription: Florida joins New York and Maryland in putting abortion rights on the ballot in November. See how voters in other states have sided in the past.

title: Trump, Madoff bond comparison is missing context | Fact check
shortDescription: While Trump's bond is meant to shield his assets during an appeal, Madoff's bond kept him out of jail while he was awaiting trial.

title: Congress postpones spy tool reforms amid stark disagreements
shortDescription: Former National Security Agency general counsel Glenn Gerstell is one of dozens of retired intelligence officials trying to protect Section 702.

title: Trump hit with wider gag order after attacking NY judge's daughter
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump was hit with a wider gag order in his hush money case after repeatedly targeting the judge's daughter on social media.

title: Wisconsin voters to decide if outside groups can help fund elections
shortDescription: Wisconsin voters will decide whether outside groups can help fund elections in Tuesday's primary, a measure that could affect November elections.

title: Trump posts $175 million bond to shield his assets in NY fraud case
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump posted a bond Monday to shield his assets during his civil fraud appeal after a New York court lowered the cost for him.

title: Voters can elect 'Literally Anybody Else' for president | Fact check
shortDescription: The man formerly known as Dustin Ebey provided USA TODAY with a driver's license and court documents showing his new name was approved in January.
